purpose: Human verification log for SC-11 match extensions on amiga_games — extra time and/or penalties. Review every game whose witness or structured cols indicate ET or pens; pens-only witness often still followed ET (parenthetical may be post-ET or ET-period score). Present in games = human checked. Absent = not yet reviewed. Not a bulk-backfill queue.

workflow.summary: Parser and backfill produce starting guesses only. A game counts as verified only after it appears in games below.
steps: Forum or witness read (or other primary source) for the game.
Compare witness to goals_a/goals_b, goals_et_*, pens_* on amiga_games. Fix DB if the parser or a prior session guess was wrong.
If knockout finish or standings may change: backfill-standings-stage-id --tournament-id {id} and refresh-event-finish-snapshots for that event.
Add a games entry with extension_kinds, interpretation, structured cols, and note. Only then is the game verified.
not_verification: bulk backfill-match-extensions or parser output filling goals_et_* / pens_*
finish or standings that happen to match the current DB
agent or session notes outside this register

agent_handoff.when: Each extension-review workflow step (one game or a batch per tournament) — before asking the human to verify.
include_per_game: tournament_games_url — browser list for the event
game_id — amiga_games.id (locate row in that list)
source_scores_id — Access Scores row id when present
players — player A vs player B (player A = goals_*_a columns)
phase — g.phase witness label (or stage name when relevant)
structured_cols — goals_a/goals_b (regulation), goals_et_a/goals_et_b (ET period only), pens_a/pens_b
forum_urls — from disposition_register + review queue (+ related league event for cup splits)
review_queue_line and disposition_notes when present in repo
forum_game_hints — repo doc snippets that mention this game id, if any
agent_handoff.example: Kelkheim VII — http://ratingskickoff.test/amiga/tournament/games.php?id=215 — g8924 — Stefan V vs Michael O — Final — access_witness_extra: '4-4 a.e.t' — forum: (check disposition / forum thread)

column_meanings.goals_a_goals_b: Regulation (90 min) only — same as A/B columns on games list; Elo uses these.
column_meanings.goals_et_a_goals_et_b: Goals scored in the extra-time period only (player A / player B). Post-ET score = regulation + ET period.
column_meanings.pens_a_pens_b: Penalty shootout score (player A / player B); not added to Sum column.
column_meanings.games_list_sum: amiga_game_ratings.sum_of_goals — regulation goals only (goals_a + goals_b); must stay in sync when regulation cols change.

entry_fields.extension_kinds: et | pens | et_and_pens — what this game needed checked
entry_fields.regulation: regulation score as stored in goals_a/goals_b
entry_fields.goals_et_a: structured ET-period goals (player A) when applicable
entry_fields.goals_et_b: structured ET-period goals (player B) when applicable

1189.note: Kristiansand semi; Aasmund F (player A) scored in ET; post-ET 1-0; forum p=48040

8924.note: Kelkheim VII final leg 2; post-ET total 4-4; Michael ET equalizer; two-leg agg 9-8 Michael
